feedback: The contract proposal is thorough, testable, and faithful to the bash reference. All 23 criteria have concrete, automatable test methods with explicit assertions and exact-match thresholds. Coverage of harness/lib/git.sh is complete: every one of the nine top-level functions is named in C3-02 and exercised behaviourally (create_harness_branch in C3-03/C3-04, create_sprint_branch in C3-05/C3-06/C3-16, merge_sprint in C3-07/C3-08/C3-09/C3-16, fail_sprint_attempt in C3-10/C3-11/C3-12, commit_harness_state in C3-13/C3-14, generate_pr_body in C3-15, create_pr/create_fix_pr/create_issue in C3-17). Coverage of tests/layer1/test-git.bats is complete: each of the 13 @test scenarios maps to a dedicated criterion (create-branch->C3-03, create-branch-idempotent->C3-04, sprint-branch-creates->C3-05, sprint-branch-cleanup->C3-06, merge-creates-merge-commit->C3-07, merge-creates-tag->C3-08, merge-deletes-branch->C3-09, fail-tags-attempt->C3-10, fail-deletes-branch->C3-11, fail-returns-to-harness->C3-11/C3-12, commit-state-commits->C3-13, commit-state-noop-when-clean->C3-14, generate-pr-body->C3-15) and C3-18 enforces method count >= 13. Branch and tag naming is enforced byte-for-byte (C3-03, C3-05, C3-07, C3-08, C3-10, C3-16) including the two-digit zero-pad rule and the exact merge-commit message format. gh/origin graceful degradation is covered in C3-17 (no exception when gh is missing or when origin is absent, returns empty string for create_issue). The constraint against modifying any .sh or .ps1 file is locked down by C3-22 (git diff against the sprint-02 pass tag must be empty for both git.sh and test-git.bats and any other .sh/.ps1). Stdlib-only enforcement (C3-23) and regression coverage for sprints 1 and 2 (C3-21) are both blocking. Files list is minimal and correct (harness/lib/git.py and tests/layer1/test_git.py only). Out-of-scope explicitly excludes touching bash, GitPython substitution, and live network calls. Notes accurately capture the load-bearing semantics (no-ff merge message, evaluator-artifacts staging step before merge, stash/drop dance in fail_sprint_attempt). Accept.
